import logging

from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError, OperationalError

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def _safe_create(session, entity, error_label):
    try:
        session.add(entity)
        session.commit()
        return entity
    except IntegrityError:
        session.rollback()
        logger.error("Duplicate %s", error_label)
        return None
    except OperationalError:
        session.rollback()
        logger.error("Database connection failed during %s creation", error_label)
        return None


def create_user(data):
    user = User(name=data["name"], email=data["email"])
    return _safe_create(db.session, user, "user")


def create_order(data):
    order = Order(customer_id=data["customer_id"], total=data["total"])
    return _safe_create(db.session, order, "order")
